languages.text: "Я думал, что наши взгляды на ситуацию сходятся. Что вы предлагаете?"
"I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"
languages.original_text: "Я думал, что наши взгляды на ситуацию сходятся. Что вы предлагаете?"

traits.locale_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"
"I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"
"I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

languages.text: «Creía que compartíamos la misma opinión sobre esta situación. ¿Qué me sugiere?».
languages.original_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

traits.locale_text: «Creía que compartíamos la misma opinión sobre esta situación. ¿Qué me sugiere?».

languages.text: “我还以为我们意见一致呢。您有什么建议？”
languages.original_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

traits.locale_text: “我还以为我们意见一致呢。您有什么建议？”

languages.text: « Je croyais que nous étions du même avis à ce sujet. Que proposez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

traits.locale_text: « Je croyais que nous étions du même avis à ce sujet. Que proposez-vous ? »

languages.text: "Durum hakkındaki görüşlerimizin benzer olduğu aklımdan geçmişti. Ne öneriyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

traits.locale_text: "Durum hakkındaki görüşlerimizin benzer olduğu aklımdan geçmişti. Ne öneriyorsunuz?"

languages.text: "Ich dachte, wir hätten bezüglich der Situation ähnliche Ansichten. Was schlagt Ihr vor?"
languages.original_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich dachte, wir hätten bezüglich der Situation ähnliche Ansichten. Was schlagt Ihr vor?"

languages.text: 「我々の状況認識は似通っていると思っていました。あなたは何を提案するのですか？」
languages.original_text: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"

traits.locale_text: 「我々の状況認識は似通っていると思っていました。あなたは何を提案するのですか？」
